creator: neldredge@math.ucsd.edu
text:
Just as a note: I hacked together something with hwpmc to generate NMIs 
and drop to the debugger, and even that did not interrupt this hang. 
Note, however, that this would not interrupt a halted cpu.  So either it's 
that, or a hardware crash of some kind, I guess.

Btw, the newline behavior seems to have gone away in further tests.

-- 

Nate Eldredge
neldredge@math.ucsd.edu
